=== Phase 12 probe — Zelda27.86 + Lua-only ===
f=230 GameMode=$01 Sub=$00 CurSaveSlot=$03

======= PROBE A — FS1 alignment =======
CurSaveSlot=$03
--- VDP SAT (Y,link,attr,X) for sprites 0,4..9 ---
  spr00: Y=$0129 X=$00A8 tile=$1F2 pal=1  screen(X=40,Y=169)
  spr04: Y=$00DD X=$00B0 tile=$008 pal=0  screen(X=48,Y=93)
  spr05: Y=$00DD X=$00B8 tile=$00A pal=0  screen(X=56,Y=93)
  spr06: Y=$00F5 X=$00B0 tile=$208 pal=0  screen(X=48,Y=117)
  spr07: Y=$00F5 X=$00B8 tile=$20A pal=0  screen(X=56,Y=117)
  spr08: Y=$010D X=$00B0 tile=$408 pal=0  screen(X=48,Y=141)
  spr09: Y=$010D X=$00B8 tile=$40A pal=0  screen(X=56,Y=141)
--- Plane A rows 8..22 cols 0..31 (cell tile index) ---
  row08: 124 124 124 169 16A 16A 16A 16A 16A 16A 124 117 10A 116 10E 124 16A 16A 16A 124 115 112 10F 10E 124 16A 16A 16A 16B 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=64
  row09: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=72
  row10: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124

  row11: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 162 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=88
  row12: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124

    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=104

  row17: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 162 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=136
  row18: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=144
  row19: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=152
  row20: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=160
  row21: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 11B 10E 110 112 11C 11D 10E 11B 124 122 118 11E 11B 124 117 10A 116 10E 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=168
  row22: 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124
    first_nonblank_col=3 screen_Y=176
--- Computed FS1 deltas ---
  heart sprite screen=(X=40,Y=169)
  link0  sprite screen=(X=48,Y=93)
  heart_X - link0_X = -8
  heart_Y - link0_Y = 76
  link sprite tile = $008

======= PROBE D — FS1 Link CHR tile bank dump =======
  BANK_A (vram $0100): 00 00 05 55 00 00 55 55 00 60 57 77 00 60 77 77 00 66 76 56 00 66 76 76 00 76 66 66 00 77 56 67
  BANK_B (vram $4100): 00 00 09 99 00 00 99 99 00 A0 9B BB 00 A0 BB BB 00 AA BA 9A 00 AA BA BA 00 BA AA AA 00 BB 9A AB
  BANK_C (vram $8100): 00 00 0D DD 00 00 DD DD 00 E0 DF FF 00 E0 FF FF 00 EE FE DE 00 EE FE FE 00 FE EE EE 00 FF DE EF
  BANK_D (vram $C100): 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24 81 24

======= PROBE C — FS2 alignment =======
entering REGISTER: f=230 GameMode=$01
  after 3x Down: CurSaveSlot=$03
  after Start+30f: f=264 GameMode=$0E Sub=$04
  REGISTER mode reached
--- FS2 VDP SAT sprites 0..15 ---
  spr00: Y=$00B0 X=$00C3 tile=$1F2 pal=1  screen(X=67,Y=48)
  spr01: Y=$00A7 X=$00F0 tile=$124 pal=1  screen(X=112,Y=39)
  spr02: Y=$00FF X=$00B0 tile=$124 pal=1  screen(X=48,Y=127)
  spr03: Y=$0179 X=$00B0 tile=$4CC pal=0  screen(X=48,Y=249)
  spr04: Y=$00B1 X=$00D0 tile=$008 pal=0  screen(X=80,Y=49)
  spr05: Y=$00B1 X=$00D8 tile=$00A pal=0  screen(X=88,Y=49)
  spr06: Y=$00C9 X=$00D0 tile=$208 pal=0  screen(X=80,Y=73)
  spr07: Y=$00C9 X=$00D8 tile=$20A pal=0  screen(X=88,Y=73)
  spr08: Y=$00E1 X=$00D0 tile=$408 pal=0  screen(X=80,Y=97)
  spr09: Y=$00E1 X=$00D8 tile=$40A pal=0  screen(X=88,Y=97)
  spr10: Y=$0179 X=$00D7 tile=$4D2 pal=0  screen(X=87,Y=249)
  spr11: Y=$0179 X=$014C tile=$4D2 pal=0  screen(X=204,Y=249)
  spr12: Y=$0179 X=$00FB tile=$4D2 pal=0  screen(X=123,Y=249)
  spr13: Y=$0179 X=$00D0 tile=$4D2 pal=0  screen(X=80,Y=249)
  spr14: Y=$0179 X=$00DF tile=$4D4 pal=0  screen(X=95,Y=249)
  spr15: Y=$0179 X=$00A4 tile=$4D4 pal=0  screen(X=36,Y=249)
--- FS2 Plane A rows 4..22 cols 0..31 ---
  row04: 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124

  row22: 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 124 16C 124 124 124 124
--- FS2 work-RAM state ---
  $0012 GameMode = $0E
  $0085 cursor Y base = $87
  $0084 name cursor Y = $2F
  $0070 name cursor X = $70
  $0071 cursor X      = $30
  $041F CharBoardIndex = $00
  $0420 InitName      = $01
  $0421 NameCharOfs   = $00
  block cursor (spr2) screen Y=127  (work RAM $0085=$87 → expected sprite Y=119)

======= PROBE B — A-press / typing diagnosis =======
  [pre-A] f=264 $00F8=$00 $0420=$01 $041F=$00 $0421=$00 $0305=$24
    $0638..$063F: 24 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  pressing P1 A 1 frame...
  [post-A-1] f=265 $00F8=$40 $0420=$01 $041F=$00 $0421=$00 $0305=$24
    $0638..$063F: 24 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  [post-A-4] f=268 $00F8=$00 $0420=$01 $041F=$00 $0421=$00 $0305=$24
    $0638..$063F: 24 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  pressing P1 Right 1 frame...
  [post-Right] f=272 $00F8=$00 $0420=$01 $041F=$01 $0421=$00 $0305=$24
    $0638..$063F: 24 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  pressing P1 A 1 frame...
  [post-A-2nd] f=273 $00F8=$40 $0420=$01 $041F=$01 $0421=$00 $0305=$24
    $0638..$063F: 24 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  [post-A-2nd-4] f=276 $00F8=$00 $0420=$01 $041F=$01 $0421=$00 $0305=$24
    $0638..$063F: 24 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  pressing P1 B 1 frame...
  [post-B] f=277 $00F8=$80 $0420=$01 $041F=$01 $0421=$01 $0305=$0B
    $0638..$063F: 0B 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  [post-B-4] f=280 $00F8=$00 $0420=$01 $041F=$01 $0421=$01 $0305=$0B
    $0638..$063F: 0B 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  pressing P1 C 1 frame...
  [post-C] f=281 $00F8=$20 $0420=$01 $041F=$01 $0421=$08 $0305=$0B
    $0638..$063F: 0B 24 24 24 24 24 24 24
  [post-C-4] f=284 $00F8=$00 $0420=$01 $041F=$01 $0421=$08 $0305=$0B
    $0638..$063F: 0B 24 24 24 24 24 24 24

=== phase12 probe end ===
